title: Quest 2 Slice Toasters with Auto-Centring and Variable Browning / 7 Different Settings/Reheat, Defrost & Cancel Options/Cool Touch / 2 Colours (White/Silver)
features: 2 SLICE TOASTER – Combining modern design with practical performance, this 850W 2 slice toaster with wide slots makes a great addition to any home and is ideal for toasting sliced bread, crumpets, and bagels.

AUTO-CENTRING AND VARIABLE BROWNING – The toaster has an auto-centring feature which toasts the whole piece of bread fully to avoid white edges. With a variable browning control with 7 settings, you can set the toaster so that you get your perfect-coloured toast every time or alternatively, use the cancel button mid-toasting to check on the colour.

REHEAT AND DEFROST OPTION – The reheat function means that you can easily warm up toast that has cooled down, perfect for those times when you are busy and miss the toast popping up. The defrost button allows you to toast bread straight from the freezer without the need to leave it to defrost.

CRUMB TRAY AND CORD STORAGE – The toaster’s removable crumb tray makes for easy cleaning and the integrated cord storage helps keep your worktops tidy and fuss-free. For your safety, the toaster is cool touch, has non-slip feet and an anti-jam function for easy toast removal.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Quest 2 Slice Toasters These 2-Slice toasters are a kitchen essential for anyone who enjoys a satisfying piece of toast. Their reheat function means that you can easily warm up toast that has cooled down, and the handy defrost button allows you to toast bread straight from the freezer. Each toaster is designed with wide slots to fit larger slices of bread, an anti-jam function to prevent bread getting stuck, and a crumb tray to help make cleaning simple. Previous page Auto-Centering The toaster has a built-in auto centering feature, ensuring a whole slice of bread is evenly toasted Cancel, Reheat & Defrost Reheat cooled toast, defrost frozen bread, or cancel mid-toasting using the buttons on the side. Variable Browning Turn the dial to adjust the variable browning settings, with a choice of 7 different levels. Removable Crumb Tray The toaster includes a crumb tray to prevent mess, which can be removed for easy cleaning. Anti-Jam Function The toaster's design ensures bread doesn't get jammed when pushed in or released from the toaster. Next page 1 Auto-Centering 2 Cancel, Reheat & Defrost 3 Variable Browning 4 Removable Crumb Tray 5 Anti-Jam Function
